verified: Studio source stores only privacy preference and selected model ID in localStorage.
Pairing session is held in memory and is lost on reload.
Contract test rejects pairing-token, prompt, and output persistence.
Reload E2E required a new pairing.
notVerified: A reproducible browser storage export covering localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, Cache Storage, and Service Worker state was not captured because the browser control environment does not expose DevTools storage export.
